videos.summary_source_text:
Which golf ball should YOU buy 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

videos.title: The Warning Signs in Your Feet You Should NEVER Ignore
videos.summary_source_text:
The Warning Signs in Your Feet You Should NEVER Ignore Did you know you can spot liver problems in your feet?

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4sR9AWf

Timestamps: 
0:00 Liver problems can show up in your feet; here’s what to look for
2:40 Itching of the bottom of your foot indicates a backup of fluid into the liver
4:44 Here are some causes of liver problems
5:40 I recommend a good diet for your liver

Because liver problems often show up in your feet, I explain the signs and symptoms to look for. For a full diagnosis of liver disease, please see your doctor.

Red and brown dots, which can also be shiny, can appear on the lower leg. This indicates poor circulation. It could also be diabetes, but you see this a lot in people with liver problems.

You may also see spider veins (spider nevus). This can be an indication of too much estrogen in the liver. If your heels are cracked, this is usually a vitamin B3 deficiency or an omega 3 fatty acid deficiency. One function of the liver is to make bile to help your body absorb fatty acids including vitamin A and vitamin E.

Itching on the bottom of your foot indicates a backup of fluids into the liver. For example, if bile backs up and your liver is congested, you could be getting a build up of histamines. 

Pain or inflammation in the bottom of the foot often mimics plantar fasciitis, but can be a liver problem. You can also have hot feet, and bad odor when your liver can’t detoxify correctly so toxins are leaking out through your skin. 

Usually if someone’s liver is bad, it means their diet is bad, and their body is full of toxins. Chances are, if your liver is bad so too are your kidneys and colon. 

If you have pitting edema is also a common liver symptom. You may also have toenail fungus. People with liver problems often have more fungus in and on their body, due to an imbalance of their gut microflora. You may also experience dandruff and psoriasis. Your nail beds turn white.

Common causes of liver problems include medications, sugar (especially high fructose corn syrup), cooked foods, too few vegetables, excessive alcohol, and excessive protein. 

A healthy ketogenic diet combined with intermittent fasting is best for a healthy liver.

Now you know how to spot liver problems, understand their causes, and how to get your liver healthy again.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: How did BMW get it so WRONG? M3 v M5 DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
How did BMW get it so WRONG? M3 v M5 DRAG RACE Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0905

It’s a BMW estate head-to-head! 

We’ve got our hands on the BMW M3 CS Touring, and it’s going up against Mat’s long-term BMW M5 Touring test car! 

The question is, how different are these two long-bodied BMWs? Let’s check out the stats… 

The BMW M5 Touring houses a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, coupled with an electric motor. The two combine to produce 727hp and 1,000Nm, and this power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic gearbox. All in it costs from £116,160, and it’s incredibly heavy, tipping the scales at 2,475kg! 

Then we come to the M3 CS Touring. Under the bonnet, it ‘only’ has a 3-litre twin-turbo straight-six, and this creates 550hp and 650Nm. Power is once again sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic gearbox, and it costs almost the same as the M5, costing £120,600. However, it’s a whole lot lighter than the M5, weighing in at 1,850kg. 

So the M5 has more power, and an electric motor - but it weighs almost 650kg more than the M3! Can you pick a winner? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

Ultimate BWM M drag race: https://bit.ly/BMW-M-Drag-Race-0905 Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0905

videos.title: När norske Tordenskjold anföll Göteborg
videos.summary_source_text:
När norske Tordenskjold anföll Göteborg 00:00-00:40   Intro

10:01-13:55   Tordenskjolds sista sjöstrid

NÄR TORDENSKJOLD ANFÖLL GÖTEBORG
Sjökrig, kapare och stormaktstid

Kung Karl XII:s död vid Fredriksten i Norge 1718 innebar slutet för den svenska stormaktstiden. Men kriget på västkusten fortsatte, inte minst på grund av den livliga kaperiverksamheten, som hade sitt centrum i Göteborg. Lars Gathenhielm - Lasse i Gatan - var den mest kände kaparen och hans namn vilar tungt över Majorna.

De svenska kaparna blev ett svårt gissel för den dansk-norska handelssjöfarten och under ledning av Peder Tordenskjold, ursprungligen från Trondheim, anfölls Nya Varvet, Marstrand och Nya Älvsborgs fästning. Tordenskjolds sista sjöstrid utspelade sig i Göteborg och i tornet på Nya Älvsborg sitter fortfarande kanonkulor från belägringen 1719.

videos.title: UK | 08th May Friday - RIFT Before You Quit – Ep4 | Understanding Alpha Flow, Smart Flow & Microflow
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 08th May Friday - RIFT Before You Quit – Ep4 | Understanding Alpha Flow, Smart Flow & Microflow In Episode 4 of the “RIFT Before You Quit” series, we take a deep dive into the core execution architecture behind the RIFT automated trading engine and explain why professional trading systems rely on diversified trading behavior instead of a single strategy model.

This session breaks down:

Why single-strategy trading systems eventually fail
The difference between retail trading behavior and institutional execution models
How RIFT’s Alpha Flow, Smart Flow, and Microflow are designed to adapt to changing market conditions
Why market volatility, liquidity, and exposure management matter
How professional systems diversify execution behavior rather than simply diversifying assets

Topics covered include:
✅ Alpha Flow – High momentum participation during volatility expansion
✅ Smart Flow – Balanced execution for consistency in rotational markets
✅ Microflow – Precision exposure management during uncertainty and unstable conditions
✅ Institutional vs Retail trading behavior
✅ Dynamic position sizing and fragmented execution models
✅ Diversified strategic portfolio allocation examples
✅ Why adaptive execution architecture is the future of automated trading

The livestream also explores real market examples using:

Tesla volatility conditions
S&P 500 rotational environments
Federal Reserve / FOMC uncertainty events
NASDAQ heat maps
VIX Index behavior

This educational session is designed to help users, leaders, and affiliate marketers better understand the technology and strategic structure behind the RIFT ecosystem so they can present the platform professionally and confidently. videos.title: Hindi | 08th May, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 08th May, Friday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Struggling With Your Soft Drag?  Fix It Fast!
videos.summary_source_text:
Struggling With Your Soft Drag?  Fix It Fast! The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: From Worst Player on Her B Team to Making AAA in 2.5 Years
videos.summary_source_text:
From Worst Player on Her B Team to Making AAA in 2.5 Years From Worst Player on Her B Team to Making AAA in 2.5 Years

Ben Frank has coached hockey for over 20 years. He played at the University of Toronto, has a kinesiology degree, has run double-A and triple-A teams, and is currently the president of the Junior Reign Youth Hockey Club in Southern California.

He thought he had all the answers when his daughter Riley started playing hockey at 10. Two years later, she was still the weakest player on her B team. Then Ben found Train 2.0 — and within 3 years, Riley went from the worst player on her B team to making the U16A Lady Ducks (the defending state champion team), getting selected for the U15 Multi-District High Performance Camp in Las Vegas, and being evaluated by USA Hockey's national development staff.

In this episode of the Train 2.0 Show, Kevin McKinnon sits down with Ben to break down:
→ Why a 20-year coach with a kinesiology degree was missing key mechanics.
→ The skepticism Ben had when he first found Train 2.0 (and how he tested it secretly).
→ The mechanics that changed everything: the soft drag, the anchor, the shuffle.
→ Why coaches kept saying "Riley always has her head up" after the mechanics clicked.
→ How hockey sense improved as a side effect of better movement.
→ Why parents started asking "What's happening with Riley?" 
→ Advice for coaches on the fence about Train 2.0 certification.

If you're a hockey dad, a hockey coach, or a parent watching your kid stuck at one level, this episode is for you.

videos.title: The $250 Million ChatGPT Prompt: How One CEO Asked AI to Help Him Commit Fraud
videos.summary_source_text:
The $250 Million ChatGPT Prompt: How One CEO Asked AI to Help Him Commit Fraud A South Korean gaming CEO asked ChatGPT how to escape a $250 million contract.

He followed its advice.

A Delaware judge unwound the entire scheme — and the chat logs he thought he deleted became evidence in court.

This is Part 2 of the series on what happens when people treat generative AI like a confidential advisor instead of what it actually is: a stenographer with no loyalty, building a forensically recoverable record of every decision you workshop with it.

Every prompt you type is a timestamped, recoverable, court-admissible transcript of your decision-making.

You're not consulting an advisor. You're training a witness for the prosecution.


▶ Watch Complete Video: https://youtu.be/n6R7005Y-z8

🔔 Subscribe to The Late Byte with Robi: https://www.youtube.com/@TheLateBytewithRobi?sub_confirmation=1

videos.title: Grok 5 Explained: Is Musk's 10% AGI Claim Actually Real?
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5 Explained: Is Musk's 10% AGI Claim Actually Real? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk says Grok 5 has a 10% chance of becoming AGI — but is that number real, or just hype? In this deep dive, I break down exactly what Musk claimed, what Grok 5 actually is under the hood, and whether the 10% AGI probability holds up under scrutiny.

We cover the leaked specs (6 trillion parameters, 10T variant in the pipeline), Colossus 2 — xAI's million-GPU supercomputer, multimodal training with real-time video understanding, ARC-AGI benchmark performance, and what top researchers like Andrej Karpathy, Yann LeCun, and Yoshua Bengio are actually saying about Musk's prediction.

If you're trying to figure out whether Grok 5 is the AGI moment or just the next Musk timeline that slips by 18 months, this video gives you the full picture — specs, timeline, expert pushback, and what it means for your job and industry.

1 cup oatmeal and oranges / No white sugar or white flour! I haven't eaten sugar for years! 1 cup oatmeal and oranges / No white sugar or white flour! I haven't eaten sugar for years!

2 oranges.
1 cup (120 g) rolled oats.
1 tsp baking powder.
1/4 cup (30 g) shredded coconut.
Salt.
Olive oil.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 40 minutes.
3.5 oz (100 g) sugar-free dark chocolate.
1/3 cup (70 g) almonds.

videos.title: Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship Highlights from round two of the Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship, where a host of Spanish stars battle to make the cut in Barcelona including local hero Pablo Larrazábal as the nine-time DP World Tour winner tees it up at his home club.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The DP World Tour is back to where it all started this week. Spain was the host of the first ever DP World Tour - then European Tour - event in 1972 so it is fitting that it is where the 2026 European Swing gets started. The fourth of five Global Swings on the 2026 Race to Dubai, the European Swing consists of six counting events - four of which are national opens - with the US PGA Championship and U.S. Open also happening within the same timeframe. Spain has long been one of the world's great golfing nations and this week local heroes will take centre stage, with a string of established and rising stars searching for home glory. Nacho Elvira has already won in 2026 and will be hungry for more, as will fellow winners in recent seasons Eugenio Chacarra, Alejandro del Rey, Angel Hidalgo and Pablo Larrazábal.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour

You Can't Steal a Charity — Musk vs OpenAI Trial Explained Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone thinks the Musk vs. Altman trial is just another billionaire feud. It's not. The verdict in this Oakland courtroom could quietly reshape how every AI company on the planet gets built, funded, and governed for the next decade — and almost nobody is connecting the dots.

In this deep dive, I break down what's actually happening inside the trial: the four legal landmines no one is covering, the bombshell moments from the courtroom (including Greg Brockman's "warm to steal the nonprofit" journal entry), and the three verdict scenarios that could land — each one sending shockwaves through the AI industry in completely different ways.

By the end, you'll understand this trial better than 99% of the headlines you'll read tomorrow.

videos.summary_source_text:
Kvinnor får sämre rådgivning än män. Två personer. Samma ekonomi.
Olika råd – bara på grund av kön.

En studie på 27 000 bankmöten visar att kvinnor:
– får färre rabatter
– rekommenderas dyrare fonder
– oftare styrs mot bankens egna produkter

Och ja – det kostar.

≈ 38 000 – 40 000 kror per 100 000 investerade kronor över 20 år
… bara i avgifter.

Det mest obehagliga?
Skillnaden ligger inte i behov – utan i hur kunden uppfattas.

Det här kallas statistisk diskriminering:
rådgivaren gissar din kunskap istället för att ta reda på den.

Det är inte alltid illvilja.
Men det blir ändå dyrt.

👉 Vad kan du göra?

– Jämför med en billig indexfond
– Träffa fler än en rådgivare

Eller enklare, spara:
→ brett
→ billigt
→ långsiktigt

i en passiv global indexfond eller fondrobot.

Tack till dig som supporter – du gör att vi kan bryta ner sånt här.

👉 Har du varit med om något liknande?

Källa:
Bucher-Koenen, T., Hackethal, A., Koenen, J. och Laudenbach, C. (2025) ‘Gender Differences in Financial Advice’, American Economic Review, 115(12), s. 4218–4252. doi: 10.1257/aer.20211024.

videos.title: Apple Pulled This... I Run AI On It
videos.summary_source_text:
Apple Pulled This... I Run AI On It 🔗 Get the full build, every command, every config inside the Creator Magic community → https://mrc.fm/closetai 🧠⚡

I went fully off-grid with AI in this one. Frontier models like Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5 are incredible, but every call my OpenClaw and Hermes agents make is hitting someone else's server and paying someone else's bill — so I asked the dangerous question: can I get near-frontier intelligence running entirely on a machine in my own house that nobody can throttle, rate limit, or take away? Right before Apple quietly pulled the 256GB Mac mini M4 and the 256GB RAM Mac Studio M3 Ultra from their website, I managed to grab the exact config I needed, and in this video I set it up from scratch step by step — power settings, headless SSH, static hostname, Homebrew, Ollama, LM Studio, MLX — so you can copy exactly what I did. Then I throw real agent prompts at Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, GPT-OSS-120B, Gemma 4 and MiniMax M2.7 to find out which ones actually replace frontier work, before plugging the whole thing directly into my OpenClaw and Hermes stack so my agents are now running 100% local — silent, sub-100W, in a closet, forever. They tried to take away my cloud intelligence. They will never take away the intelligence I own.

18:49 Conclusion: Can it Replace Cloud AI? 🔗 Get the full build, every command, every config inside the Creator Magic community → https://mrc.fm/closetai 🧠⚡

The Effortless Power Move For Golfers Over 50 #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

Golf tips for seniors who want effortless power and more distance start with one make-or-break move — and Eric Cogorno breaks it down into 3 simple steps any golfer over 50 can do.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you. 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• Why the senior golf swing lives or dies in the first half of the backswing — and the one core move that fixes it immediately
• How to use the club-in-the-stomach golf drill (learned from instructor JT Thomas) to build an easy golf swing for seniors that generates power before the downswing even begins
• The exact trail foot position — toes flared, pulled back to the midpoint of your lead foot — that unlocks effortless power and reduces strain
• How Sam Snead's setup and backswing model helped him play elite golf well into his 60s, and how you can use the same blueprint today
• The right shoulder retraction move that dramatically increases your turn and creates a bigger backswing — no extra flexibility required
• Golf drills you can practice anywhere to groove a repeatable, powerful backswing sequence from setup through the top
• A complete 3-step system from golf lessons and live golf school experience with over 10,000 students — proven to add distance without added effort

Eric Cogorno has built this 3-part framework from years of hands-on golf school and online coaching experience, watching the same backswing breakdowns cost senior golfers distance they don't have to lose. The core turn, trail foot position, and right shoulder depth covered in this video address the root cause — not the symptoms — of a weak, effortful golf swing. Whether you're trying to get back yards you've lost or simply make the game feel easier, these are the foundational pieces. For more on building a powerful, efficient swing, check out Eric's related driver distance videos on the channel.

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

videos.title: The HIDDEN Cause of Chronic Phlegmy (Mucus) Throat
videos.summary_source_text:
The HIDDEN Cause of Chronic Phlegmy (Mucus) Throat If you’re dealing with chronic phlegm or mucus in the throat, this is for you. Find out how to get rid of phlegm and excess mucus to finally put a stop to constant throat clearing. 

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/499EzWT

0:00 Introduction: Chronic phlegm and mucus buildup  
0:18 Post-nasal drip and sinus drainage 
0:30 Silent acid reflux mucus
1:34 The hidden cause of phlegm 
3:37 The vagus nerve and chronic mucus 
4:01 Other causes of excess mucus  
4:53 Determining the cause of chronic mucus
5:38 Natural remedies for phlegm 
6:00 Betaine hydrochloride 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements

Watch more videos on mucus, digestion, and the real cause of heartburn:
▶️ https://youtu.be/t8y4-wR0ajo
▶️ https://youtu.be/MzPw7UvAcio
▶️ https://youtu.be/xcBoVYJh_QA

Constantly clearing your throat? If decongestants and antihistamines aren’t working, the real problem may not be post-nasal drip or your lungs; it could be silent reflux.

Many cases of chronic phlegm and throat clearing are caused by silent reflux, where digestive enzymes like pepsin irritate the throat and vocal cords. In response, the body produces inflammatory mucus as a protective mechanism.

Silent reflux can occur when the valve at the top of the stomach isn’t functioning properly. This may be related to SIBO, but more commonly it’s linked to low stomach acid. When stomach acid isn’t acidic enough, and the pH becomes too high, the valve can lose its ability to stay closed properly.

Antacids may provide temporary relief, but they can further weaken stomach acid and worsen the underlying problem over time.

The stomach valve and digestive processes are also heavily influenced by the vagus nerve, which controls the parasympathetic “rest-and-digest” system. 

Chronic stress can interfere with this system and contribute to silent reflux symptoms.
Frequent eating can further weaken stomach acid, and the problem often becomes more common with age.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. This video is for general informational purposes only. It should not be used to self-diagnose, and it is not a substitute for a medical exam, cure, treatment, diagnosis, prescription, or recommendation. Always seek the advice of a physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

Silent reflux can occur when the valve at the top of the stomach isn’t functioning properly. This may be related to SIBO, but more commonly it’s linked to low stomach acid. When stomach acid isn’t acidic enough, and the pH becomes too high, the valve can lose its ability to stay closed properly.

Antacids may provide temporary relief, but they can further weaken stomach acid and worsen the underlying problem over time.

The stomach valve and digestive processes are also heavily influenced by the vagus nerve, which controls the parasympathetic “rest-and-digest” system. 

Chronic stress can interfere with this system and contribute to silent reflux symptoms.
Frequent eating can further weaken stomach acid, and the problem often becomes more common with age.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4dw8aLw

By the time you begin forgetting names, misplacing things, or feeling confused, the disease may have already been developing in your brain for 10 to 20 years.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

That’s what makes early detection so important.

Researchers have found that dementia doesn’t begin in the memory centers of the brain: it starts elsewhere, affecting other functions long before memory decline appears.

Don’t wait until symptoms get worse; understand the early warning signs now.

Next level-tips i beskrivningen nedan.

Videon är i samarbete med Kockums Jernverk.
Du hittar deras webshop här: https://bit.ly/4wA8bH1
*Använd koden MATGEEK25 för 25% rabatt på hela sortimentet. *
Gäller till och med 31 maj  2026.

Tips för dig med mer tålamod:
1. Kör vitlöken i rapsolja i en kastrull på medeltemperatur så de hinner bli mjuka utan att få färg. Tänk "mycket vitlök" och "lite rapsolja". Man vill få SMAK. Sila bort vitlöken och använd sen den svalnade oljan till räkorna.

2. Lägg två limehalvor på stekbordet med snittsidan nedåt och låt dem bli riktigt bruna. Pressa dem sen över de färdiga räkorna för mer karamellig smak.

3. Låt räkorna marinera i olja, vitlök och chili i kylen hela natten för smakfestival!

At Mark Crossfield Golf, we know that mastering your golf swing and perfecting your golf grip are fundamental to becoming a better golfer. Our videos dive deep into the essentials of a solid golf swing, teaching you how to swing a golf club with precision and power. From golf swing basics to advanced golf swing drills and techniques, we cover it all. Learn the importance of a proper golf grip. Whether you're looking to improve your golf swing takeaway or refine your golf swing tempo, we have the expert golf instruction you need.

Our channel offers a wide range of golf lessons tailored to golfers of all skill levels. From fixing your slice to hitting longer drives, our golf swing tips are here to help you play smarter and more efficiently.

This in-depth approach to golf instruction is ideal for golfers who want to understand the finer points of their golf swing and improve their overall technique.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: 7 STRAIGHT! Carolina Hurricanes Win 4-1 in Game 3 to Take a 3-0 series Lead Over Flyers
videos.summary_source_text:
7 STRAIGHT! Carolina Hurricanes Win 4-1 in Game 3 to Take a 3-0 series Lead Over Flyers The Carolina Hurricanes take a 3-0 stranglehold on their Round 2 matchup against the Philadelphia Flyers, winning 4-1 in Game 3. Between Frederik Andersen, the special teams, and a total team win, what does it mean for the Canes as they are one step closer to another sweep and the Eastern Conference Final? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the special teams were the main component of the Hurricanes' winning Game 3. Between two power plays and one shorthanded goal, it gave the Hurricanes some life, knowing that they can score on special teams if 5v5 cannot be played much. Furthermore, the penalty kill showed why it's the Hurricanes' strong suit, with going 100% again. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how Frederik Andersen is the best goalie of the playoffs and how he keeps raising his game as the playoffs continue. Furthermore, he discusses how it's once again a total team effort in the win, with three players scoring their first goals of the playoffs. Finally, Zach takes a small look ahead to Game 4 on Saturday, as the Hurricanes will be looking for their second sweep in a row. What should fans expect in the first do-or-die game of Round 2? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: UK | 07th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 07th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: The Quinn Hughes Shuffle
videos.summary_source_text:
The Quinn Hughes Shuffle The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: DeepSeek’s Claude Code Killer Goes Viral Overnight
videos.summary_source_text:
DeepSeek’s Claude Code Killer Goes Viral Overnight DeepSeek just got its own version of Claude Code. DeepSeek-TUI is an open-source terminal coding agent built around DeepSeek V4, and it suddenly went viral on GitHub after developers started calling it a cheaper, open-source alternative to Claude Code. It can read and edit files, run shell commands, manage Git, search the web, use sub-agents, and work directly inside the terminal.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:27 How DeepSeek-TUI became the viral “Claude Code Killer” on GitHub
SOURCE: https://eu.36kr.com/en/p/3797706474872065
3:29 Why developers are comparing DeepSeek-TUI directly to Claude Code
SOURCE: https://pandaily.com/deepseek-claude-code-clone-8700-stars
5:43 How DeepSeek V4 powers the terminal coding agent with a one-million-token context window
SOURCE: https://api-docs.deepseek.com/news/news260424
9:07 Why open-source AI coding agents are becoming a serious threat to closed tools
SOURCE: https://cybernews.com/ai-news/deepseek-claude-code-clone-popularity-github/

🚨 Why It Matters
DeepSeek-TUI shows how fast open-source AI coding tools are catching up. Instead of using a closed coding assistant, developers can now run a DeepSeek V4-powered agent inside the terminal, connect it to real files and commands, and customize the workflow themselves. The tool is still early and stability is still a question, but its viral rise shows that Claude Code-style agents are no longer limited to big AI companies.

videos.title: Claude vs Gemini vs Grok Who Reaches AGI First 2026 Breakdown
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude vs Gemini vs Grok Who Reaches AGI First 2026 Breakdown Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Claude, Gemini, or Grok — which AI lab actually crosses the AGI finish line first? I went deep into the official model cards, funding rounds, compute partnerships, and safety frameworks for Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and xAI to find out. The answer surprised me.

In this video, I break down where each lab stands in 2026 — their philosophy, model architectures, compute strategy, funding, deployment reach, and real shot at AGI. By the end, you'll have a grounded picture of the race instead of hype.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 Intro — The AGI race in 2026
01:08 Organizational Philosophy & Safety Stance
02:51 Model Architectures & Capabilities
05:13 Scaling Strategies: Compute, Data, Model Size
07:25 Productization & Deployment
09:10 Funding & Compute Access
11:00 Recent Milestones & Benchmarks
12:47 The Prediction
14:53 Counterarguments & Uncertainties

🔑 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN
- Why Anthropic's safety-first bet may be the strategic move
- How xAI's Colossus GPU farm stacks up against Google's TPU stack
- Why Claude dominates enterprise while Gemini dominates everything else
- The compute deals that quietly reshaped the race
- My pick for who reaches AGI first — and why

📌 Sources: Official model cards, Anthropic Responsible Scaling Policy, Google DeepMind publications, xAI Frontier AI Framework, public funding announcements.

videos.title: You’re Losing Distance Before You Swing… I’d Tee It Here
videos.summary_source_text:
You’re Losing Distance Before You Swing… I’d Tee It Here There’s one simple driver concept I moved away from over time… and honestly, I didn’t realise how much it was hurting my driving until recently.

When my driver started feeling completely off, I went back to this forgotten feel/setup change and instantly started finding the middle of the face more consistently again.

The best part? It’s made my driver more reliable even on days where my swing doesn’t feel at its best.

If your driver feels “dead”, this could be exactly what you’re missing.

Key moments in this video:

00:10 Why you are hitting driver wrong 
00:25 How I hit more fairways
00:40 If you can't miss left with driver
1:22 Where to tee it up with driver
2:16 Where to aim with driver 
2:45 How to hit driver even longer and hit driver straighter 
3:00 If you slice driver
3:10 If you can't miss driver right
3:51 Where to tee up your driver 
4:51 How to hit more fairways with this set up 
6:12 Tee height concept that saved my driver 
6:28 Tee the golf ball higher 
7:09 Tee the golf ball lower

videos.title: Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship The best of the action from round one of the Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship from Real Club de Golf El Prat in Barcelona. Featuring Francesco Molinari, Rafa Cabrera Bello, Martin Couvra and more.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The DP World Tour is back to where it all started this week. Spain was the host of the first ever DP World Tour - then European Tour - event in 1972 so it is fitting that it is where the 2026 European Swing gets started. The fourth of five Global Swings on the 2026 Race to Dubai, the European Swing consists of six counting events - four of which are national opens - with the US PGA Championship and U.S. Open also happening within the same timeframe. Spain has long been one of the world's great golfing nations and this week local heroes will take centre stage, with a string of established and rising stars searching for home glory. Nacho Elvira has already won in 2026 and will be hungry for more, as will fellow winners in recent seasons Eugenio Chacarra, Alejandro del Rey, Angel Hidalgo and Pablo Larrazábal.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Google Remy Explained: The 24/7 AI Agent That Changes Everything
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Remy Explained: The 24/7 AI Agent That Changes Everything Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google didn't just build a new AI assistant — they cleared the field for it. In this video we break down the rise and fall of OpenClaw, the mass ban wave that wiped out third-party Gemini agents overnight, and what Google Remy actually is under the hood.
We get into:

Why OpenClaw collapsed (the "Trusted Environment Fallacy," CVE-2026-25253, the ClawHavoc supply chain attack)

The Antigravity ban wave and why thousands of paying users got nuked
What Remy actually does — and how the Knowledge Catalog kills hallucinations
Mixture-of-Recursions (MoR): the architecture that makes a 24/7 personal agent economically possible
Google vs. OpenAI vs. Anthropic — who actually wins your daily life

Are you the oarsman — or the passenger? Drop your take in the comments.

🔔 Subscribe for more deep dives on where AI is actually going.

videos.title: How To ACTUALLY Develop Your Biceps
videos.summary_source_text:
How To ACTUALLY Develop Your Biceps Most people are training curls WRONG… and don’t even realize it.
Your biceps don’t just flex the elbow, they also SUPINATE the forearm. That means if you’re waiting until the TOP of the curl to rotate your wrist, you’re missing one of the biggest functions of the bicep entirely.
The problem? Most people hammer curl the weight up first and then turn the wrist when there’s almost no resistance left. At that point, you’re taking tension OFF the bicep and shifting more of the work to the brachialis instead.
The fix is simple:
Supinate AS you curl.
One of the best ways to make this even more effective is by using an offset grip; shifting the dumbbell toward the thumb side of your hand so the weight fights against your ability to rotate the wrist. More resistance during supination means more tension where you actually want it: the biceps.
Right tip. Wrong timing.
For more tips on how to build muscle and get big biceps, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

videos.title: Har ditt barn ett eget ISK med en större summa pengar?
videos.summary_source_text:
Har ditt barn ett eget ISK med en större summa pengar? Har ditt barn ett eget ISK med en större summa pengar? Då har Skatteverket nu skickat ut slutskattebesked — eller så är det på väg hem till er. Här är två tips. 📬

Jag fattar att det inte är ett stort problem eftersom 150.000 kr är skattefritt och nästa är höjs det till 300.000 kr. Men i ett avsnitt flaggde Kronofogden för att obetald ISK-skatt är en av de vanligaste anledningarna till att barn hamnar i deras register. Och det är just för att skatten inte dras automatiskt — den måste betalas in manuellt.

⏰ Deadline: 13 juli.
💡 Bonus-tips: Sätt upp dig som deklarationsombud hos Skatteverket. Då sköter du barnets deklaration via din egen inloggning. Smidigt.
🗣️ Och — perfekt tillfälle att prata med tonåringen om hur skatt funkar. Sverige har en av de lägsta kapitalskatterna i världen. Att betala skatt betyder att man tjänat pengar. Något bra. (Vår tonåring var inte helt övertygad. 🙈)

videos.title: 90% of Golfers Can't Compress Their Irons (Do This First)
videos.summary_source_text:
90% of Golfers Can't Compress Their Irons (Do This First) 90% of golfers struggle to compress their irons properly — and it’s costing them distance, control and consistency.

In this video I’ll show you the two key movements most golfers are missing if they want to strike their irons with real compression.

The first is learning how to create a more neutral club path, which allows the club to approach the ball from a much better position. Once that is in place, the second step is learning how to shift pressure and move more towards the target, helping you control low point and deliver the club with forward shaft lean.

Get these two pieces in the correct order and you’ll start to see cleaner strike, better compression and more powerful iron shots almost immediately.

If you’ve ever struggled with:

Thin iron shots
Heavy strikes
Weak contact
Inconsistent distance

this lesson will help you understand what’s really missing in your iron swing and how to fix it with simple, practical drills.

These ai agents can be built through simple chat interactions or the openai agent builder, allowing for automation of various tasks. ⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
🏌️ 1:50 Why Golfers Over 50 Must Stop Relying on the Downswing for Power 
⚡ 2:19 The #1 Make-or-Break Move: Early Core Rotation Explained 
🎯 2:53 The Club-in-the-Stomach Drill to Train Your Core Turn 
💪 3:45 Sam Snead's Backswing Secret Every Senior Golfer Should Copy

✅ 7:40 Power Move #3 — Finishing the Backswing and Creating Depth 
🏆 8:30 Right Shoulder Retraction: The Trick That Gets You More Turn 
💥 9:48 Full Swing Sequence — Putting All 3 Power Moves Together

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• Why the senior golf swing lives or dies in the first half of the backswing — and the one core move that fixes it immediately
• How to use the club-in-the-stomach golf drill (learned from instructor JT Thomas) to build an easy golf swing for seniors that generates power before the downswing even begins
• The exact trail foot position — toes flared, pulled back to the midpoint of your lead foot — that unlocks effortless power and reduces strain
• How Sam Snead's setup and backswing model helped him play elite golf well into his 60s, and how you can use the same blueprint today
• The right shoulder retraction move that dramatically increases your turn and creates a bigger backswing — no extra flexibility required
• Golf drills you can practice anywhere to groove a repeatable, powerful backswing sequence from setup through the top
• A complete 3-step system from golf lessons and live golf school experience with over 10,000 students — proven to add distance without added effort

Eric Cogorno has built this 3-part framework from years of hands-on golf school and online coaching experience, watching the same backswing breakdowns cost senior golfers distance they don't have to lose. The core turn, trail foot position, and right shoulder depth covered in this video address the root cause — not the symptoms — of a weak, effortful golf swing. Whether you're trying to get back yards you've lost or simply make the game feel easier, these are the foundational pieces. For more on building a powerful, efficient swing, check out Eric's related driver distance videos on the channel.

videos.title: V8 v I6 v V6 v I4: OFF-ROAD BATTLE
videos.summary_source_text:
V8 v I6 v V6 v I4: OFF-ROAD BATTLE Huge thanks to the people who provided their cars for this video!

Toyota Land Cruiser - https://www.instagram.com/drivenplusuk/
Ineos Grenadier - https://www.instagram.com/nm4x4driving/
VW Touareg - https://www.instagram.com/darksidedevelopments/
Jeep Wrangler - https://www.instagram.com/buzz_special_vehicles/

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-09-05

It’s time for another off-road showdown! 

The four cars set to go head-to-head over this off-road course are a Jeep Wrangler, an Ineos Grenadier, a Land Cruiser 200 Series, and… a Volkswagen Touareg?! 

The Touareg may seem out of place in this list, but trust us, it might be one of the most capable cars here! Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

The Jeep Wrangler rolls up with a 2-litre 4-cylinder petrol that’s been tuned to deliver 304hp and 400Nm. This power is sent to all four wheels, and it weighs in at 2,580kg. It is also equipped with a load of features to help it off-road, including front & rear locking diffs and a low-range mode.

Up next, we have the tuned Grenadier. It rolls up with a 3-litre straight-six diesel that puts down 249hp and 550Nm. This power is sent to all four wheels, and it weighs in at 2,740kg. It comes with low-range mode, standard locking centre diffs and optional locking front and rear diffs. 

Following that, we have the Land Cruiser. It’s powered by a 4.5-litre twin-turbo diesel V8 that puts down 286hp and 650Nm. Power is sent to all four wheels via a 6-speed auto, and it weighs 2,555kg. In terms of off-road capabilities, it has a low-range mode and a Torsen limited-slip centre differential, as well as an adjustable ride height. 

Finally, we come to the Touareg, which is powered by a 3-litre turbocharged V6 diesel to deliver 357hp and 767Nm. It has a 6-speed auto gearbox to send this power to all four wheels, and it weighs in at 2,700kg! But it comes packed with off-road tech that has led to the large weight increase! Huge thanks to the people who provided their cars for this video!

Toyota Land Cruiser - https://www.instagram.com/drivenplusuk/
Ineos Grenadier - https://www.instagram.com/nm4x4driving/
VW Touareg - https://www.instagram.com/darksidedevelopments/
Jeep Wrangler - https://www.instagram.com/buzz_special_vehicles/

Is Your Earlobe Warning You About A Heart Attack? Did you know a simple line on your ear could be a warning sign of heart disease?

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4cWva79

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, we break down Frank’s sign, a diagonal crease on the earlobe that has been linked to a higher risk of Coronary Heart Disease. Studies have shown this crease appears in a large percentage of people with underlying heart issues, yet most people have never heard of it.

Your earlobe might be giving you an early clue. Don’t ignore it.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: BROAD STREET BOUND! Carolina Hurricanes' Game 3 Storylines
videos.summary_source_text:
BROAD STREET BOUND! Carolina Hurricanes' Game 3 Storylines After a couple of days off, Game 3 for the Carolina Hurricanes is finally upon us. The Hurricanes look to take a 3-0 stranglehold on the series against the Philadelphia Flyers. While they did win Game 2 in a comeback, what do they need to do to win Game 3? That said, what are the storylines heading into Thursday's game? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how special teams will be a key component once again. The Hurricanes' penalty kill went 6-for-7, while the power play went 1-for-6. How can they get that going and be efficient like the penalty kill? What do they need to do to fight off a desperate Flyers team, which does not want to go down 3-0 in the series at home? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the players he will keep an eye on in Game 3. Who needs to step up? Who will be impactful for the Hurricanes? Zach also picks his Canes to Click for Game 3. Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on the new cap structure for the 2026-27 season. What does it mean for the Hurricanes with the cap going up by $8.5 million? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 06th May, Wednesday- Rift Before You Quit | Inside the Auto Engine, AI Architecture & Future of Rift
videos.summary_source_text:
06th May, Wednesday- Rift Before You Quit | Inside the Auto Engine, AI Architecture & Future of Rift In Episode 3 of Rift Before You Quit, Shavez goes deeper into the architecture behind Rift’s Auto Trading Engine and explains what actually powers a system that trades more consistently than humans.

This session breaks down the difference between manual trading and structured automation, why execution speed matters, and how systems outperform emotional decision-making through repeatability, discipline, and capital preservation.

Inside this episode:
• Why 70–90% of retail traders fail
• Human trading vs system-based execution
• How automation really works in trading
• The importance of repeatability and compounding
• Why execution delay destroys profitability
• Manual vs semi-automated vs fully automated systems
• The complete Rift architecture explained
• Capital layer, strategy layer, execution layer & risk management
• The role of AI and structured execution in Rift
• Understanding Alpha Flow, Smart Flow & MicrFlow
• Fragmented trades and diversified exposure
• How compounding creates long-term growth
• Why professional systems focus on consistency over hype
• Futures trading coming to Rift
• New insights dashboard walkthrough
• Upcoming features and ecosystem expansion teased by Shavez

This episode also includes a first look at the upcoming Rift Futures system, the new referral insights dashboard, and major hints about future features being developed inside the Rift ecosystem.

If you want to understand how professional execution systems operate and why structured automation changes the game, this episode is essential.
